name: @harness/proactivity-modes
description: ISSUE-068 (C9 MODE) — the proactive-autonomy POLICY layer. Stamps every proactive item with exactly one mode ∈ {Suggest, Prepare, Act} MAPPED FROM the C6 approval tier (auto→Act, soft→Prepare, hard→Suggest/Prepare-to-hard-queue), never from a second risk classifier; indeterminate → Suggest, never Act (FR-9.MODE.001/002). Enforces the operator-configurable action-autonomy matrix + its non-negotiable floor: floored sub-types (existing-client/SoR comms, financial, Confidential/Restricted) are code-fixed at hard-approval and never Act; low-risk-external is configurable between Suggest and Prepare only; NO sub-type can reach Act (OD-161 — Act is not a reachable matrix value); sub-type-ambiguous → floored; the floor caps the mode regardless of matrix or default (AC-9.MODE.004.5). Routes every proactive action through the IDENTICAL C6 guardrail pipeline (no proactive bypass, fail-closed on guardrail error — FR-9.MODE.003 / NFR-SEC.013 / FR-6.FMM.001). Matrix writes gated by PERM-guardrail.edit_autonomy (Super-Admin only); denied edits logged. Pure policy in modes.ts; ProactivityStore port + InMemory reference fake in store.ts; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter; index.ts `check` is the no-DB non-drift guard (proactive_mode enum == PROACTIVITY_MODES; no matrix path reaches Act).
